description: User completes account creation (email + password step). Top of the conversion funnel.
User clicks to start checkout for a specific plan. Captures plan name, slug, currency, and price. Critical conversion event.
User requests a magic link login. Indicates passwordless auth preference.
User successfully signs in with password. Used for user identification.
User finishes the onboarding conversation flow and brand config is saved. Includes company name, industry, autonomy level, and platforms selected.
User sends a message in the Ask AI interface. Captures whether a quick action or free-form text was used.
User initiates OAuth connection flow for a social platform. Captures platform name.
User disconnects a social account. Captures platform name.
Server-side: AI content generation API call completes. Captures platform, confidence score, and whether human review is required.
Server-side: Stripe checkout session created successfully during onboarding. Captures plan ID and currency.
Server-side: Stripe webhook confirms subscription created/activated. Captures org ID and plan name.
Server-side: Stripe webhook reports a failed payment. Captures fail count and dunning step.
Server-side: Subscription is canceled via Stripe webhook. Key churn event.
